nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hi {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, helping out at {{tenantName}}.

I saw you were looking for baked goods. Quick tip from the kitchen: the reason grocery store cakes last for three weeks is the preservatives. Real, artisan baking made with butter and fresh ingredients simply tastes different because it's real food.

Just thought you'd appreciate the insight!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hi {{name}},

Quick story — {{tenantName}} recently catered a large event where the client was incredibly stressed about dietary restrictions.

We customized the entire spread so everyone could actually enjoy dessert, not just look at it. The host said people were talking about the pastries more than the venue.

That's what happens when you care about the details.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hi {{name}},

I should tell you a bit more about {{tenantName}}.

They've spent {{years}} perfecting {{profession}}. Our proudest creation recently: {{biggestWin}}. Our philosophy: {{differentiator}}.

We don't do mass-produced. We bake for {{icp}}.

If you want something memorable, our oven is ready.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hi {{name}},

Just checking in — how's the event planning going?

{{tenantName}} asked me to follow up and see if you still needed anything sweet for the occasion.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hi {{name}},

Quick question.

On a scale of 1-10, how close are you to locking in your bakery order? (1 = Just gathering ideas, 10 = I need to place a deposit today).

Just reply with a number.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Got it, that helps.

What would it take to be a 10? Are you unsure about flavors, worried about the budget, or just have a few more places to check out?

Let me know so I can get you the right menu or info.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
I totally get that — {{answer}}.

That's super common. Actually, {{tenantName}} built our tasting and ordering process specifically to make that part easier, which is how we nailed {{biggestWin}}.

Does knowing we have a seamless way to handle that bump you closer to a 10?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

I'll be upfront — {{tenantName}} has a smaller commercial kitchen, so our calendar fills up weeks in advance.

I can hold a tentative slot for your date, but if you aren't ready to commit, I need to release it to other clients.

Let me know where you stand!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hi {{name}},

Before I clear your date off our calendar, think about this.

People forget the decorations at a party, but they always remember if the food was incredible or terrible. 

If you want to guarantee your guests are raving about dessert, let's get you in the books. Reply "Let's bake" if you're ready.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

This is my last message about your inquiry. I'll take your info off our active list.

{{tenantName}} is busy in the kitchen prepping for this weekend's orders! Reach out if you ever need anything in the future.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hi {{name}},

Checking in — just passing along some sweet news.

{{tenantName}} just introduced a new menu featuring {{differentiator}}. 

Hope you're having a great season!

— {{botName}}
